categories.label: Rest-Activity Rhythms
categories.description: Non-parametric rest-activity rhythm metrics and related summary measures.

categories.label: Fragmentation / State Transition
categories.description: Metrics that quantify fragmentation of rest and activity patterns.

categories.label: Light Metrics
categories.description: Light exposure summary and threshold-based metrics.

categories.label: Advanced Analyses
categories.description: Advanced signal-processing and chronobiology analyses exposed by pyActigraphy.

metrics.label: Average Daily Activity Total
metrics.summary: Average total daily activity across the recording.
metrics.description: Computes the average daily activity total over the recording, with optional rescaling to account for masked periods and optional exclusion of partial start/end days.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to a binary active/inactive series before computing ADAT.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

parameterSchema.name: rescale
parameterSchema.label: Rescale for masked periods
parameterSchema.description: Rescale daily totals to account for masked periods.

parameterSchema.name: exclude_ends
parameterSchema.label: Exclude first and last day
parameterSchema.description: Exclude partial first and last days from the calculation.

metrics.label: Average Daily Activity Total per Period
metrics.summary: Average daily activity total computed separately for each period.
metrics.description: Splits the recording into consecutive periods and computes ADAT for each period.

parameterSchema.name: period
parameterSchema.label: Period length
parameterSchema.description: Length of each consecutive period, expressed as a pandas-style duration string.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to a binary active/inactive series before computing ADATp.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

parameterSchema.name: rescale
parameterSchema.label: Rescale for masked periods
parameterSchema.description: Rescale period totals to account for masked periods.

parameterSchema.name: exclude_ends
parameterSchema.label: Exclude first and last day
parameterSchema.description: Exclude partial days from the calculation.

parameterSchema.name: verbose
parameterSchema.label: Verbose output
parameterSchema.description: Show the number of periods found and unaccounted time.

metrics.label: Least Active 5 Hours
metrics.summary: Mean activity during the 5 least active hours of the day.
metrics.description: Computes the average activity during the least active 5-hour interval of the average day.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing L5.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

metrics.label: Most Active 10 Hours
metrics.summary: Mean activity during the 10 most active hours of the day.
metrics.description: Computes the average activity during the most active 10-hour interval of the average day.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing M10.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

metrics.label: Relative Amplitude
metrics.summary: Relative amplitude between the most active 10 hours and least active 5 hours of the average day.
metrics.description: RA is computed from M10 and L5 and is commonly used to quantify the strength of day-night rest-activity rhythm amplitude.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing RA.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

metrics.label: Least Active 5 Hours per Period
metrics.summary: L5 computed separately for each consecutive period.
metrics.description: Splits the recording into consecutive periods and computes the L5 value for each period.

parameterSchema.name: period
parameterSchema.label: Period length
parameterSchema.description: Length of each consecutive period.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing L5p.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

parameterSchema.name: verbose
parameterSchema.label: Verbose output
parameterSchema.description: Show period-count and unaccounted-time information.

metrics.label: Most Active 10 Hours per Period
metrics.summary: M10 computed separately for each consecutive period.
metrics.description: Splits the recording into consecutive periods and computes the M10 value for each period.

parameterSchema.name: period
parameterSchema.label: Period length
parameterSchema.description: Length of each consecutive period.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing M10p.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

parameterSchema.name: verbose
parameterSchema.label: Verbose output
parameterSchema.description: Show period-count and unaccounted-time information.

metrics.label: Relative Amplitude per Period
metrics.summary: RA computed separately for each consecutive period.
metrics.description: Splits the recording into consecutive periods and computes RA independently for each period. Default period length is 7 days in pyActigraphy tutorials.
references: pyActigraphy tutorial: Non-parametric variables per period

parameterSchema.name: period
parameterSchema.label: Period length
parameterSchema.description: Length of each consecutive period.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing RAp.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

parameterSchema.name: verbose
parameterSchema.label: Verbose output
parameterSchema.description: Show period-count and unaccounted-time information.

metrics.label: Interdaily Stability
metrics.summary: Quantifies the repeatability of the daily rest-activity pattern across days.
metrics.description: IS is a non-parametric rest-activity rhythm variable that reflects how stable the 24-hour activity pattern is across the recording.

parameterSchema.name: freq
parameterSchema.label: Resampling frequency
parameterSchema.description: Resampling frequency used before computing IS.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing IS.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

metrics.label: Mean Interdaily Stability
metrics.summary: Average IS across multiple resampling frequencies.
metrics.description: ISm is the average of IS values computed using several allowed resampling frequencies.
references: pyActigraphy tutorial: Mean IS and IV

parameterSchema.name: freqs
parameterSchema.label: Resampling frequencies
parameterSchema.description: Set of allowed resampling frequencies across which IS is averaged.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing ISm.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

metrics.label: Interdaily Stability per Period
metrics.summary: IS computed separately for each consecutive period.
metrics.description: Splits the recording into consecutive periods and computes IS independently for each period. Default period length is 7 days in pyActigraphy.
references: pyActigraphy tutorial: Non-parametric variables per period

parameterSchema.name: period
parameterSchema.label: Period length
parameterSchema.description: Length of each consecutive period.

parameterSchema.name: freq
parameterSchema.label: Resampling frequency
parameterSchema.description: Resampling frequency used before computing ISp.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing ISp.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

parameterSchema.name: verbose
parameterSchema.label: Verbose output
parameterSchema.description: Show period-count and unaccounted-time information.

metrics.label: Intradaily Variability
metrics.summary: Quantifies fragmentation or hour-to-hour variability in the activity rhythm.
metrics.description: IV is a non-parametric metric that reflects rhythm fragmentation and within-day variability.

parameterSchema.name: freq
parameterSchema.label: Resampling frequency
parameterSchema.description: Resampling frequency used before computing IV.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing IV.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

metrics.label: Mean Intradaily Variability
metrics.summary: Average IV across multiple resampling frequencies.
metrics.description: IVm is the average of IV values computed across several allowed resampling frequencies.
references: pyActigraphy tutorial: Mean IS and IV

parameterSchema.name: freqs
parameterSchema.label: Resampling frequencies
parameterSchema.description: Set of allowed resampling frequencies across which IV is averaged.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing IVm.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

metrics.label: Intradaily Variability per Period
metrics.summary: IV computed separately for each consecutive period.
metrics.description: Splits the recording into consecutive periods and computes IV independently for each period. Default period length is 7 days in pyActigraphy.
references: pyActigraphy tutorial: Non-parametric variables per period

parameterSchema.name: period
parameterSchema.label: Period length
parameterSchema.description: Length of each consecutive period.

parameterSchema.name: freq
parameterSchema.label: Resampling frequency
parameterSchema.description: Resampling frequency used before computing IVp.

parameterSchema.name: binarize
parameterSchema.label: Binarize activity signal
parameterSchema.description: Convert activity to binary active/inactive values before computing IVp.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used if binarization is enabled.

parameterSchema.name: verbose
parameterSchema.label: Verbose output
parameterSchema.description: Show period-count and unaccounted-time information.

metrics.label: Sleep Regularity Index
metrics.summary: Quantifies regularity of sleep-wake timing from one day to the next.
metrics.description: SRI is computed from a binary sleep-wake time series, so it requires sleep scoring or equivalent sleep-state information.

metrics.label: Total Sleep Time
metrics.summary: Total amount of sleep in the analyzed interval.
metrics.description: TST is derived from an algorithm-generated or diary-based sleep/rest time series.

metrics.label: Wake After Sleep Onset
metrics.summary: Wakefulness occurring after sleep onset within the analyzed sleep period.
metrics.description: WASO is a sleep-fragmentation summary derived from a scored sleep/rest series.

metrics.label: Sleep Efficiency
metrics.summary: Proportion of time in bed or sleep interval spent asleep.
metrics.description: Sleep efficiency is a sleep summary statistic derived from a scored sleep/rest series, often reported as a percentage.

metrics.label: kRA
metrics.summary: Rest-to-activity transition probability summary metric.
metrics.description: kRA summarizes the sustained transition probability from rest to activity and is used to characterize fragmentation of rest-activity patterns.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used to classify epochs as active or resting.

parameterSchema.name: start
parameterSchema.label: Start time
parameterSchema.description: Optional analysis-window start time. pyActigraphy also allows AonT and AoffT keywords.

parameterSchema.name: period
parameterSchema.label: Period length
parameterSchema.description: Optional analysis-window duration.

parameterSchema.name: frac
parameterSchema.label: LOWESS fraction
parameterSchema.description: Fraction of data used for LOWESS smoothing.

parameterSchema.name: it
parameterSchema.label: LOWESS iterations
parameterSchema.description: Number of LOWESS residual-based reweighting iterations.

parameterSchema.name: logit
parameterSchema.label: Apply logit transform
parameterSchema.description: Return logit-transformed kRA instead of the raw value.

metrics.label: kAR
metrics.summary: Activity-to-rest transition probability summary metric.
metrics.description: kAR summarizes the sustained transition probability from activity to rest and is used to characterize fragmentation of rest-activity patterns.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used to classify epochs as active or resting.

parameterSchema.name: start
parameterSchema.label: Start time
parameterSchema.description: Optional analysis-window start time. pyActigraphy also allows AonT and AoffT keywords.

parameterSchema.name: period
parameterSchema.label: Period length
parameterSchema.description: Optional analysis-window duration.

parameterSchema.name: frac
parameterSchema.label: LOWESS fraction
parameterSchema.description: Fraction of data used for LOWESS smoothing.

parameterSchema.name: it
parameterSchema.label: LOWESS iterations
parameterSchema.description: Number of LOWESS residual-based reweighting iterations.

parameterSchema.name: logit
parameterSchema.label: Apply logit transform
parameterSchema.description: Return logit-transformed kAR instead of the raw value.

metrics.label: Time Above Threshold
metrics.summary: Time spent above a specified light threshold.
metrics.description: TAT is a light-exposure metric supported by pyLight workflows in pyActigraphy and will be available only when light data are present.

parameterSchema.name: threshold
parameterSchema.label: Light threshold
parameterSchema.description: Threshold used for the time-above-threshold light metric.

metrics.label: Mean Light Above 500 lux
metrics.summary: Light-exposure summary using the 500 lux threshold family described in pyLight examples.
metrics.description: Placeholder metadata for pyLight threshold-based metrics. Will be enabled when the backend light-analysis path is added.

metrics.label: Cosinor Analysis
metrics.summary: Cosinor model fitting for periodic rhythmicity analysis.
metrics.description: Advanced pyActigraphy analysis module for rhythmic signal modeling.

metrics.label: Detrended Fluctuation Analysis
metrics.summary: Detrended fluctuation analysis of actigraphy signals.
metrics.description: Advanced pyActigraphy analysis module for signal scaling and complexity properties.

metrics.label: Functional Linear Modelling
metrics.summary: Functional linear modelling of actigraphy signals.
metrics.description: Advanced pyActigraphy analysis module for functional-data-style modelling.

metrics.label: Locomotor Inactivity During Sleep
metrics.summary: Locomotor Inactivity During Sleep analysis.
metrics.description: Advanced pyActigraphy analysis for characterizing sleep-related inactivity patterns.

metrics.label: Singular Spectrum Analysis
metrics.summary: Singular spectrum analysis for decomposition and rhythm extraction.
metrics.description: Advanced pyActigraphy analysis module for decomposition and component extraction.
